description: The AGGREGATE believer credential — a W3C-Verifiable-Credential-data-model-shaped record that rolls up a DID's verified identityClaims into an Identity Assurance Level (IAL) + proof-of-personhood signal. Per ADR-2606072100 (shomei). This is the passport-equivalent ARTIFACT: a single presentable credential proving how strongly a DID's identity is established, derived deterministically from the set of verified factors. **G3 no-PII**: contains NO personal identifiers — only `subjectDidHash` (blake2b), the SET of verified factorKinds, factor/class counts, IAL, and the proof-of-personhood boolean. **G8 identity-assurance-NOT-social-credit (CRITICAL)**: this measures how strongly identity is PROVEN, never personal worth, behavior, reputation, or rank. There is no behavioral input and no per-person ordering. **G1/G7**: for IAL ≤ 3 the credential is SELF-issued (issuer = subject; anyone re-derives it from the public claims); IAL 4 (government-verified) is Council-attested per ADR-2605260000 and is the only level the server-side gov path touches (gated).

proofOfPersonhood.description: True iff assuranceLevel ≥ 2 AND distinctClasses ≥ 2. HONEST framing: this is sybil-RESISTANCE (independent factors raise the cost of a fake identity), NOT sybil-PROOF — uniqueness-of-human is only approached at IAL 4 (gov-class, Council-gated). Never a ranking of persons (G8).

issuer.description: DID that issued the credential. For IAL ≤ 3 = the subject DID (self-issued, re-derivable from public claims). For IAL 4 = the Council-delegated attestor DID (ADR-2605260000).

subjectDidHash.description: Blake2b-256 (base64url) of the subject DID (same convention as com.etzhayyim.gov.procedure.auth.didTrustAttestation). Privacy-preserving linkage; a holder of the DID can recompute and confirm.

proofRef.description: OPTIONAL reference (CID or sig) to the subject's signature over this credential (self-issued) or the Council attestation (IAL 4). G7: the server never signs this.

revoked.description: OPTIONAL. True if a com.etzhayyim.shomei.bindingRevocation has lowered the assurance below this credential's level since issuance. Append-only: the credential record itself is never mutated (G10 as-of); a fresh credential supersedes it.

assuranceLevel.description: Identity Assurance Level. 0=did-only (no verified factor). 1=self-attested (≥1 verified factor). 2=multi-factor (≥2 verified factors across ≥2 distinct classes). 3=covenant-bound (IAL2 + ≥1 covenant-class etzhayyim factor: base-membership / adherent-sbt / at-oath). 4=government-verified (IAL3-or-2 + a verified gov-class factor; Council-attested per ADR-2605260000, gated).

verifiedFactors.description: The SET of distinct verified factorKinds contributing to this credential. Kinds only — never values/handles/identifiers (G3).

expirationDate.description: OPTIONAL Unix timestamp (seconds) of expiry. If present, verifiers reject the credential after it. Recommended for gov-class re-verification cadence.

distinctClasses.description: Number of DISTINCT factor classes among verifiedFactors (device/key/social/government/covenant). The sybil-resistance dimension: two key factors count once.

factorCount.description: Total number of verified factors (verifiedFactors length).
